series_metadata.series_title: Individual Income Tax Return for Full-Year Ohio Residents
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by individual income tax filers for filing and paying their State income tax. This form is filed annually and is due on April 15th for calendar year. Or on the 15th of the fourth month following the end of a fiscal year.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep ; Electronic: Record will be kept 10 years via ODT Info Image System
